lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires immediate action before the Day2 Health design review.
lead.deck: With a key team member departing and critical UI work underway this morning, you need to address continuity and coverage now. The timing collision between this transition and your product roadmap makes this the threshold issue for the day.
